wikitext:
{{Summon Infobox|Osty}}{{Power Infobox|Die for You|2}}'''Osty''' is a mechanic used by the {{KW|Necrobinder||2}}.

Osty is the animated left hand of the Necrobinder. Osty innately has {{BD|Die for You||2}} while he is alive. The Necrobinder has Attacks that cause Osty to Attack, which have no effect if Osty is dead when they are played. When Osty attacks, he does not consider any buffs or debuffs on the player, such as {{BD|Strength||2}} or {{BD|Weak||2}}. Osty cannot receive any buff or debuff aside from {{BD|Die for You||2}}. He cannot be directly targeted by an enemy, a potion, or another player.

When the player would receive any unblocked attack damage, the damage is first deducted from Osty's HP. If the damage is greater than Osty's current HP, Osty dies, and any remaining damage is dealt to the player. If Osty is dead for any reason when taking attack damage, {{BD|Die for You||2}} cannot activate.

Osty cannot block damage from non-Attacks, such as {{BD|Thorns||2}}, {{C|Burn||2}}, {{C|Infection||2}}, and {{C|Toxic||2}}, or direct HP loss, like {{C|Beckon||2}}.

While Osty cards are generally specific to the Necrobinder, other characters can attain these by means of the {{R|Prismatic Gem||2}}, {{R|Sea Glass||2}}, or the {{E|Colorful Philosophers|2}}. While other players are able to Summon Osty, they will not be able use Osty Attacks if they do not have Osty Summoned.

==Osty Attacks==
=== Sources ===
These Attacks are Unplayable if Osty is dead or has not been summoned.
* {{C|Unleash||2}}: Osty deals 6(9) damage. 
* {{C|Flatten||2}}: Osty deals 12(16) damage.
* {{C|Poke||2}}: Osty deals 6(9) damage.
* {{C|Snap||2}}: Osty deals 7(10) damage.
* {{C|Bone Shards||2}}: If Osty is alive, he deals 9(12) damage to ALL enemies and you gain 9(12) {{KW|Block||2}}. Osty dies.
* {{C|Fetch||2}}: Osty deals 3(6) damage.
* {{C|High Five||2}}: Osty deals 11(13) damage.
* {{C|Rattle||2}}: Osty deals 7(9) damage.
* {{C|Right Hand Hand||2}}: Osty deals 4(6) damage.
* {{C|Sic 'Em||2}}: Osty deals 5(6) damage.
* {{C|Squeeze||2}}: Osty deals 25(30) damage.
* {{C|Protector||2}}: Osty deals 10(15) damage.
* {{C|Sweeping Gaze||2}}: Osty deals 10 damage to a random enemy.

===Interactions===
* {{C|Flatten||2}}: This card costs 0 {{Icon|NE|2}} if Osty has attacked this turn.
* {{C|Calcify||2}}: Osty's attacks deal 4(6) additional damage.
* {{C|Rattle||2}}: Hits an additional time for each other time Osty has attacked this turn.
* {{C|Sic 'Em||2}}: Osty deals 5 damage. Whenever Osty hits this enemy this turn, {{KW|Summon||2}} 2.
* {{C|Squeeze||2}}: Deals 5 additional damage for ALL your other Osty Attacks.
* {{R|Bone Flute||2}}: Whenever Osty attacks, gain 2 {{KW|Block||2}}.
==Summon==
{{Keyword Infobox|Summon|2}} 
Summon is a Keyword associated with Osty. If Osty is dead, he is summoned with X HP. If he is already summoned, his Max HP is raised by X. This raises both his Max HP and his current HP.

===Relics===
* {{R|Bound Phylactery||2}}: At the start of your turn, Summon 1.
* {{R|Phylactery Unbound||2}}: At the start of each combat, Summon 5. At the start of your turn, Summon 2.

===Cards===
* {{C|Bodyguard||2}}: Summon 5(7).
* {{C|Afterlife||2}}: Summon 6(9).
* {{C|Invoke||2}}: Next turn, Summon 2(3).
* {{C|Pull Aggro||2}}: Summon 4(5). Gain 7(9) {{KW|Block||2}}.
* {{C|Cleanse||2}}: Summon 3(5). Exhaust 1 card from your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Dirge||2}}: Summon 3(4) X times. Add X {{C|Soul|Souls(+)|2}} into your Draw Pile.
* {{C|Legion of Bone||2}}: ALL players Summon 6(8).
* {{C|Sic 'Em||2}}: Whenever Osty hits this enemy this turn, Summon 2(3).
* {{C|Spur||2}}: Summon 3(5). Osty heals 5(7) HP.
* {{C|Devour Life||2}}: Whenever you play a {{C|Soul||2}}, Summon 1(2).
* {{C|Necro Mastery||2}}: Summon 5(8).
* {{C|Reanimate||2}}: Summon 20(25).

===Potion===
* {{P|Bone Brew||2}}: Summon 15.

===Interactions===
* {{C|Unleash||2}}: Deals additional damage equal to Osty's current HP.
* {{C|Protector||2}}: Deals additional damage equal to Osty's Max HP.
* {{C|Sacrifice||2}}: If Osty is alive, he dies and you gain {{KW|Block||2}} equal to double his Max HP.
